creator: mavetju@chello.nl
text:
When searching on www.freebsd.org the date of the articles
	found is wrong in the overview of the articles found.

Fix: 

none (to me at least)
How-To-Repeat: 
	Search on www.freebsd.org for the string "nethack3", maximum
	250, sort by score and source only freebsd-ports:

       The archive freebsd-ports contains the following items relevant to
       `nethack3':
	1. [2]asami@cs.b Re: Nethack won't compile
	   Score: 1308; Lines: 60; 29-Mar-1995; Archive: freebsd-ports
	2. [3]<steve@Fre Re: ports/15517: New port: games/nethack3 nethack
	   3.3.0
	   Score: 1200; Lines: 32; 29-Mar-1995; Archive: freebsd-ports
	3. [4]-Vince- <v Nethack won't compile
	   Score: 1004; Lines: 51; 29-Mar-1995; Archive: freebsd-ports
	4. [5]Gregory Bo ports/16417: nethack3 port won't compile on
	   3.4-Stable
	   Score: 771; Lines: 107; 29-Mar-1995; Archive: freebsd-ports
	5. [6]nethack@ch ports/15517: Port of newly released game nethack
	   3.3.0
	   Score: 514; Lines: 518; 16-Dec-1999; Archive: freebsd-ports
	6. [7]"matthew c diffs to make Makefiles do MASTER_SITES+=
	   Score: 244; Lines: 5847; 07-Jul-1995; Archive: freebsd-ports

	as you see the date of the articles found are all 29-Mar-1995.
